title: 5.0 out of 5 stars
text:
I recently purchased Nasher Miles The Line pink color suitcase and I loved it.
The build quality of this suitcase is impressive. The materials feel robust and durable
The color and design of this suitcase are sleek and modern. I bought pink color suitcase which looks amazing.
The zippers are smooth and sturdy.
Telescopic handle extends and retracts smoothly, and locks securely at various heights.
The 360-degree rotation is a game-changer, making movement of the suitcase much more convenient.
The suitcase arrived well-packaged.
The delivery time was prompt.

text: Amazing product! Absolutely value for money, very spacious and very ergoomic, the build quality is good! Firm and can be used as may deem fit and proper, the lock works alright and does the job. highly recommended for someone who needs it.

title: 5.0 out of 5 stars
text:
I recently purchased a cabin bag from Nasher Miles and it’s simply wonderful. Lightweight yet very spacious, with smooth wheels and a sturdy handle that make travel effortless. The quality feels premium, and the design is stylish too. Perfect for short trips — highly recommended!
Product purchased at 2000/- in amazon sale.

title: 5.0 out of 5 stars
text:
Very nice color or nice quality lock is good space very good no bags have space like this ha but after one 2 time used little dirty while flights
I’ll order cabin bag also

title: 5.0 out of 5 stars
text: This bag is a great purchase. The dual wheels make a huge difference in maneuverability compared to single-wheel trolleys. The inside is well-organized with mesh pockets, and the color is exactly as shown. For this price point, the quality of the zippers and the telescopic handle is top-notch. Very happy with this buy!

title: 1.0 out of 5 stars
text: Flimsy quality. Not worth the time and money… wheel broke as soon as I stood it up after packing… don’t waste ur time.

title: 3.0 out of 5 stars
text:
Love the bags and travel locks. I wish I could buy more now that I have left India. The case quality and design are top notch and the manoeuvrability is great compared to my safari bags. They are slightly compact compared to safari however they can accommodate more or less up to 23kg.
UPdate 1: After landing I noticed a lot more scratches than my 3 year old Safari bag. They seem to not have any protection on the surface. Hence the 3* review .
